---
title: "Statistical Consideration and Analysis Report (SCAR)"

authors:
  - name: Marothi Peter Letsoalo
    orcid: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2170-6312
    affiliation: Africa Health Research Institute (AHRI)
    roles: Statistician Analyst
    corresponding: true
    
  - name: Nondumiso Thandiwe Mthiyani
    orcid: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9881-7267
    affiliation: Africa Health Research Institute (AHRI)
    roles: Statistical
    corresponding: true
    
  - name: Kathy Baisley
    orcid: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1849-6625
    affiliation: Africa Health Research Institute (AHRI)
    roles: Lead Statistical
    corresponding: true
---
